text:
is a Japanese animated short directed by Naoyuki Asano. The short was broadcast during the EVANGELION:30; event on 21 February 2026.

Story

Two Asuka Langleys from different timelines host a comedy stage show to celebrate the 30th anniversary of the Evangelion franchise and re-enact key scenes from the TV series and the films, hoping for Asuka Langley Sohryu to find the perfect ending to her story arc.

Characters

Shinji Ikari
Asuka Shikinami Langley
Asuka Langley Sohryu
Kaworu Nagisa
